news.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.

news.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

news.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on open models?

news.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, audiobooks, and more.

news.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.

news.title: China's exports surge 27% from a year earlier as AI boom drives strong demand
news.description: [BARCHART] China’s customs agency says its exports accelerated in June, jumping 27% from a year earlier, driven by strong demand due to the boom in artificial intelligence

news.title: China's exports jump 27% in June on strong demand for AI
news.description: [THE ASSOCIATED PRESS] China’s customs agency says its exports accelerated in June, jumping 27% from a year earlier, driven by strong demand due to the boom in artificial intelligence.

news.title: China's June exports surge 27% from a year earlier as AI boom drives strong demand

news.title: South Korea forecasts 2026 economic growth at 5-year high on AI chip boom
news.description: [REUTERS] South Korea pledged on Tuesday to swiftly advance artificial intelligence investments to bolster economic ‌performance, as it raised its 2026 growth forecast to a five-year high of 3.0% on the back of a global semiconductor boom.

news.title: Cisco president Jeetu Patel: I have been saying this for months, AI will create more jobs than it eliminates and now the early data is beginning to ...

news.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

news.title: Delhi to monitor construction pollution using AI, dust sensors
news.description: [HINDUSTAN TIMES] Construction sites measuring 500 square yards or more across Delhi will now be monitored using artificial intelligence, live cameras and pollution sensors as part of an upgraded digital system aimed at tracking dust-control violations in real time...

news.title: New Illinois law prohibits use of AI in teacher evaluations
news.description: [NBC 5 CHICAGO] A new Illinois law will prohibit administrators from using artificial intelligence when performing teacher evaluations.

news.title: Why lawyers, bankers and scientists are helping AI destroy their jobs
news.description: [AUSTRALIAN FINANCIAL REVIEW] Start-ups are paying white-collar professionals to teach their jobs to artificial intelligence models. It’s a bonanza. It’s bleak. Where will it end?

news.title: Thomson Reuters to cut 'small number' of engineering jobs
news.description: [THE STAR] July 13 (Reuters) - Thomson Reuters ⁠on Monday said it is cutting "a small number of roles" ⁠in engineering, as the Canadian content and technology company aggressively ‌deploys artificial intelligence across its businesses.
